CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
CMMI Data Sharing (CMDS) — Provider File
Version — April 2025
SAS name Label Type Length Format Values
MODEL_ID Model Identifier CHAR 2 refer to Model ID tab
ENTITY_ID Entity Identifier CHAR 10
PRVDR_TIN Taxpayer Identification Number of Provider CHAR 9
PRVDR_NPI National Provider Identifier of Provider CHAR 10
PRVDR_CCN CMS Certification Number of Provider CHAR 6
START_DATE Provider Start Date DATE 8 CCYYMMDD
END_DATE Provider End Date
